final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a modern, clean, globally neutral aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered and balanced, optimized for small circular avatar crop
Subject: must include visual elements representing three content pillars: new energy / electric vehicles, digital/tech products, and lifestyle goods — unified into one cohesive icon or illustration
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant yet universally harmonious direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and inoffensive across all major global markets and social platforms (CN, US, EU, Middle East, Southeast Asia); must avoid any symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery associated with political, religious, or culturally sensitive taboos in any major region; must work visually at small sizes (avatar thumbnail scale)
Avoid: must avoid human figures, hands, flags, religious symbols, politically charged iconography, and any single-culture-specific motifs that may alienate international audiences
